'''rovafaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:nymphic|nymphic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-v-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nymphic|nymphic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| rovafaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:rovafithi|rovafithi]] || [[word:rovafiji|rovafiji]] || [[word:rovafishi|rovafishi]] || [[word:rovafiki|rovafiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:rovafuthuthu|rovafuthuthu]] || [[word:rovafujuju|rovafujuju]] || [[word:rovafushushu|rovafushushu]] || [[word:rovafukuku|rovafukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:rovafuthu|rovafuthu]] || [[word:rovafuju|rovafuju]] || [[word:rovafushu|rovafushu]] || [[word:rovafuku|rovafuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:rovafufthuf|rovafufthuf]] || [[word:rovafufjuf|rovafufjuf]] || [[word:rovafufshuf|rovafufshuf]] || [[word:rovafufkuf|rovafufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:rovafethe|rovafethe]] || [[word:rovafeje|rovafeje]] || [[word:rovafeshe|rovafeshe]] || [[word:rovafeke|rovafeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:rovafothotho|rovafothotho]] || [[word:rovafojojo|rovafojojo]] || [[word:rovafoshosho|rovafoshosho]] || [[word:rovafokoko|rovafokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:rovafotho|rovafotho]] || [[word:rovafojo|rovafojo]] || [[word:rovafosho|rovafosho]] || [[word:rovafoko|rovafoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:rovafofthof|rovafofthof]] || [[word:rovafofjof|rovafofjof]] || [[word:rovafofshof|rovafofshof]] || [[word:rovafofkof|rovafofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:rovafÃŸfthÃŸf|rovafÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:rovafÃŸfjÃŸf|rovafÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:rovafÃŸfshÃŸf|rovafÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:rovafÃŸfkÃŸf|rovafÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:rovafÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|rovafÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:rovafÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|rovafÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:rovafÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|rovafÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:rovafÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|rovafÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:rovafÃŸfthÃŸf|rovafÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:rovafÃŸfjÃŸf|rovafÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:rovafÃŸfshÃŸf|rovafÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:rovafÃŸfkÃŸf|rovafÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:rovafÃŸfthÃŸf|rovafÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:rovafÃŸfjÃŸf|rovafÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:rovafÃŸfshÃŸf|rovafÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:rovafÃŸfkÃŸf|rovafÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:rovafÃḊthÃḊ|rovafÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:rovafÃḊjÃḊ|rovafÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:rovafÃḊshÃḊ|rovafÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:rovafÃḊkÃḊ|rovafÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:rovafathatha|rovafathatha]] || [[word:rovafajaja|rovafajaja]] || [[word:rovafashasha|rovafashasha]] || [[word:rovafakaka|rovafakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:rovafatha|rovafatha]] || [[word:rovafaja|rovafaja]] || [[word:rovafasha|rovafasha]] || [[word:rovafaka|rovafaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:rovafafthaf|rovafafthaf]] || [[word:rovafafjaf|rovafafjaf]] || [[word:rovafafshaf|rovafafshaf]] || [[word:rovafafkaf|rovafafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:rovafasha|rovafasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:rovafshÃḋsha|rovafshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rovafrosha|rovafrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rovafmusha|rovafmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:rovafyasha|rovafyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorovafnkshÃḋsha|gorovafnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorovafnkrosha|gorovafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorovafnkmusha|gorovafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorovafnkyasha|gorovafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:rovavafasha|rovavafasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:rovavafshÃḋsha|rovavafshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rovavafrosha|rovavafrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rovavafmusha|rovavafmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:rovavafyasha|rovavafyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorovavafnkshÃḋsha|gorovavafnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorovavafnkrosha|gorovavafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorovavafnkmusha|gorovavafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorovavafnkyasha|gorovavafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:revÃḊfasha|revÃḊfasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:revÃḊfshÃḋsha|revÃḊfshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:revÃḊfrosha|revÃḊfrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:revÃḊfmusha|revÃḊfmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:revÃḊfyasha|revÃḊfyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorevÃḊfnkshÃḋsha|gorevÃḊfnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorevÃḊfnkrosha|gorevÃḊfnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorevÃḊfnkmusha|gorevÃḊfnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorevÃḊfnkyasha|gorevÃḊfnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:rovfafasha|rovfafasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:rovfafshÃḋsha|rovfafshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rovfafrosha|rovfafrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rovfafmusha|rovfafmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:rovfafyasha|rovfafyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorovfafnkshÃḋsha|gorovfafnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorovfafnkrosha|gorovfafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorovfafnkmusha|gorovfafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorovfafnkyasha|gorovfafnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
